claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A named contextual empty-state section with title, explanation, optional body/icon, and required recovery action.
semantics: A caller-selected native heading names the section and a description is connected through aria-describedby.
The icon is decorative, context metadata never substitutes for explanatory text, and title, description, and provided body must render meaningful content.
Primary and optional secondary recovery actions are non-fragment React elements; native actions must be enabled buttons, href-bearing anchors, or action-capable inputs.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve boundaries, text, state, and focus without color-only meaning.
preferences.reducedMotion: No semantic information depends on motion.
preferences.rtl: Logical properties mirror layout and bdi isolates localized numeric values where applicable.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Text wraps, actions reflow, and content remains readable without document clipping or hidden recovery paths.
